name: subdomains
author: XMA Corporation
description: Custom subdomain management for game servers via Cloudflare DNS API. Creates A + SRV records for Minecraft servers, allowing players to connect using memorable addresses like myserver.yourdomain.com.

cloudflare_api_token.label: Cloudflare API Token
cloudflare_api_token.help: Create a token with 'Edit zone DNS' permissions at Cloudflare Dashboard > My Profile > API Tokens

min_length.label: Minimum Subdomain Length
min_length.help: Minimum number of characters for subdomains

max_length.label: Maximum Subdomain Length
max_length.help: Maximum number of characters for subdomains

change_cooldown_hours.label: Change Cooldown (hours)
change_cooldown_hours.help: Hours users must wait before changing their subdomain again. Set to 0 to disable.

auto_delete_on_terminate.label: Auto-delete on Server Termination
auto_delete_on_terminate.help: Automatically delete DNS records when a server is terminated

auto_suspend_on_suspend.label: Auto-suspend on Server Suspension
auto_suspend_on_suspend.help: Automatically disable DNS records when a server is suspended

rate_limit.label: Rate Limit (requests/minute)
rate_limit.help: Maximum subdomain API requests per minute per user
